title: Governance Decision
description: A decision represents the governance verdict produced by the reconciler after evaluating observed events against a mission declaration. It includes the overall compliance state, any findings that were generated, the recommended containment action, and metadata about the reconciliation run.

session_id.description: Identifier of the governance session this decision pertains to. Links the decision back to the session state, declaration, and event stream.

state.description: Overall compliance state. 'compliant' means all observed behavior matches the declaration. 'violation' means one or more findings indicate policy breaches. 'unknown' means insufficient visibility to make a determination. 'pending' means reconciliation has not yet completed.

findings.description: Ordered list of findings generated during reconciliation. May be empty when the state is 'compliant' or 'pending'. Each finding details a specific observation about the agent's behavior.

recommended_action.description: The containment action recommended by the governance engine based on the severity of findings. Escalates from 'none' (no action needed) through 'log' and 'alert' to active containment via 'throttle', 'quarantine', or 'terminate'.

events_processed.description: Total number of observed events evaluated during this reconciliation pass. Provides a measure of how much of the event stream has been analyzed.

reconciliation_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this reconciliation pass completed. Used for audit trails and to determine decision freshness.
